content:
2 min read
Just now

--

Your question is very valuable. Very few people have the courage to ask questions on politics, but with the same honesty with which you have asked your question, I will answer it with the same honesty so that the matter can be understood and improvements can also be made.
Almost ninety percent of the leaders in the entire world are corrupt, evil and cruel because ninety percent of the people are blindly following them with their eyes closed and ears closed.
There are approximately ninety percent people in the entire world who do not have the courage to ask questions and do not even have the courage to listen to the answers. Such people believe in what they hear and believe in whatever is going on in the market and never think whether this thing can be wrong or right.
World leaders do not admit their mistakes because behind them stands the power of the corporates, the power of the police, the power of the military and the power of the media, hence their mistakes are easily hidden or are concealed.
There are many mistakes made by leaders which can lead them to ruin, hence they have to hide those mistakes.
Most of the mistakes are such that there are names of many leaders behind them, that is why it is hidden because if the name of one is revealed then the names of thousands of conspiring leaders will come to light.
Today in 2026, the situation in the entire world has deteriorated and wars are going on, this is due to the dirty politics of these leaders because almost ninety nine percent of the leaders are greedy, corrupt and immoral.
Then how will the improvement happen? The improvement will be like —
The youth of the entire world are the backbone of the entire world. If the youth come into politics with truth and honesty, then the entire system of the world will change completely.
And the whole world will be happy
If ten honest and truthful youth go inside the Parliament, they can show the way out to about a hundred leaders.
If these youth enter into true and honest politics, they will benefit crores of people.
If 1000 young people enter politics with truth and honesty, then understand that billions of people will benefit from it.
That is, it is because of the ignorance of the public that greedy and corrupt leaders succeed and the public has to suffer the consequences.
If intelligent and honest youth enter politics, then it is possible to completely improve the politics of the country and abroad.
Note: If the youth who read this article have a living conscience, they will truly adopt politics and improve the country, the world and the world.
(King of Satya Yuga MS Khalsa)
